payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is already recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to two different people named Sara.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter
New input: Sara is my niece

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same named person, Sara, as the existing memory, but assigns a different family relationship.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new input conflicts with an existing family relationship.

repair_options: Keep existing memory: Sara is my daughter
Replace existing memory with: Sara is my niece
Treat them as two different people named Sara
Store both only if you clarify how Sara can be both your daughter and niece
